summary: Iteration 148: Verified category rebuild and layout revision hard delete operations. All 18 backend tests passed confirming: (1) 21 passive/archive category-bound layout revisions hard deleted, (2) Category counts per country correct - real_estate=3, vehicle=9, other=99 (8 root + 91 children), (3) Category hierarchy correct with 8 root categories in 'other' module having children, (4) TR/DE/FR translations present for all categories, (5) /api/categories/tree endpoints working for all modules. Frontend /de homepage shows Category Navigator with combined categories from all modules.
seed_data_creation: Categories seeded via script for TR/DE/FR with module mapping: Immobilien->real_estate, Fahrzeuge->vehicle, Diger->other
context_for_next_testing_agent: Category rebuild completed. Active category counts: real_estate=3, vehicle=9, other=99 (8 root + 91 children) per country (TR/DE/FR). All categories have TR/DE/FR translations. 21 passive/archive category-bound layout revisions were hard deleted. The /api/categories/tree endpoint accepts country, module, and depth parameters. Frontend CategoryNavigator on /de homepage shows combined categories when module=global (omits module param).

frontend_de_homepage.categories_displayed: combined from all modules (real_estate, vehicle, other)
